member.name: T:CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder used to configure CloudPub endpoint publications and traffic proxy mode.

member.name: P:CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder.Services
member.summary: Gets the underlying service collection used to register CloudPub services.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder.AddPublishEndpoint(CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions)
member.summary: Adds a preconfigured publish endpoint definition.
member.param: Endpoint options to publish through CloudPub.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder.AddEndpoint(System.UInt16,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Adds an endpoint that targets localhost:{port}.
member.param: Optional endpoint label displayed by CloudPub.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder.AddEndpoint(System.String,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Adds an endpoint using a custom local address string.
member.param: Address in a format supported by CloudPub publish options.
Optional endpoint label displayed by CloudPub.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder.AddEndpoint(System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Adds an endpoint with implicit address resolution for protocol-specific defaults.
member.param: Optional endpoint label displayed by CloudPub.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder.WithLocalhostProxy
member.summary: Enables localhost proxy mode that forwards CloudPub traffic to local host addresses.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder.WithPipelineProxy
member.summary: Enables pipeline proxy mode that forwards CloudPub HTTP traffic directly into the ASP.NET pipeline.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: T:CloudPub.Services.CloudPubProxyMode
member.summary: Selected CloudPub traffic proxy mode for ASP.NET integration.

member.name: F:CloudPub.Services.CloudPubProxyMode.None
member.summary: No traffic proxy mode was configured.

member.name: F:CloudPub.Services.CloudPubProxyMode.Localhost
member.summary: Proxy CloudPub traffic to localhost addresses.

member.name: F:CloudPub.Services.CloudPubProxyMode.Pipeline
member.summary: Proxy CloudPub HTTP traffic directly into the ASP.NET request pipeline.

member.name: T:CloudPub.Services.HostedCloudPubLocalhostProxyService
member.summary: Hosted service that projects configured localhost proxy endpoints into the host's address list.
member.param: The ASP.NET Core server whose address list is updated with published URLs.
CloudPub hosting state with configured publish options.

member.name: M:CloudPub.Services.HostedCloudPubLocalhostProxyService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{CloudPub.Services.HostedCloudPubLocalhostProxyService},Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting.Server.IServer,CloudPub.Services.CloudPubHostingState)
member.summary: Hosted service that projects configured localhost proxy endpoints into the host's address list.
member.param: The ASP.NET Core server whose address list is updated with published URLs.
CloudPub hosting state with configured publish options.

member.name: T:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Service collection extensions for registering CloudPub client integrations in ASP.NET applications.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCloudPub(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers CloudPub using bound .

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCloudPub(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient})
member.summary: Registers CloudPub with a custom client factory.
member.param: Factory used to create the singleton .

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCloudPub(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions)
member.summary: Registers CloudPub with explicit client options.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCloudPub(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers CloudPub and binds client options from configuration.

member.name: T:CloudPub.CloudPubClientBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Convenience methods for endpoint registration on .

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientBuilderExtensions.AddEndpoint(CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder,CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions)
member.summary: Adds a preconfigured CloudPub endpoint to the builder.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientBuilderExtensions.Endpoint(CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder,System.UInt16,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Adds an endpoint by local TCP port.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientBuilderExtensions.Endpoint(CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder,System.String,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Adds an endpoint by custom local address string.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubClientBuilderExtensions.Endpoint(CloudPub.ICloudPubClientBuilder,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Adds an endpoint with protocol defaults for local address.
member.returns: The same builder instance for chaining.

member.name: T:CloudPub.CloudPubContext
member.summary: Runtime snapshot of CloudPub configuration and published endpoint state.

member.name: P:CloudPub.CloudPubContext.PublishOptions
member.summary: Gets the endpoints configured before startup.

member.name: P:CloudPub.CloudPubContext.PublishedEndpoints
member.summary: Gets endpoints successfully published during application lifetime.

member.name: P:CloudPub.CloudPubContext.ProxyMode
member.summary: Gets currently configured proxy mode.

member.name: T:CloudPub.WebApplicationHostExtensions
member.summary: Host extensions for executing CloudPub callbacks when the app is started.

member.name: M:CloudPub.WebApplicationHostExtensions.UseCloudPub``1(``0,System.Action{CloudPub.CloudPubContext})
member.summary: Registers a callback invoked when the host reaches the started state.
member.returns: The same host instance for chaining.
